New Terminal Output:

root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > process.py << 'EOF'
> import csv
> import json
> from datetime import datetime
= {
        'averageDepartmentBudget': avg_budget,
        'totalEmployees': total_employees,
        'skillDistribution': skill_dist,
        'departmentSizes': dept_sizes,
        'projectStatusDistribution': status_dist,
        'averageYearsOfService': avg_years
    }

    # Metadata
    metadata = {
        'version': '1.0',
        'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z',
        'generator': 'CSV Processor'
    }

    # Organization (name and founded not in CSV, set defaults)
    organization = {
        'name': 'Acme Corporation',
        'founded': '2000-01-01',
        'departments': org_departments
    }

    output = {
        'metadata': metadata,
        'organization': organization,
        'statistics': stats
    }

    with open('/app/organization.json', 'w') as f:
        json.dump(output, f, indent=2)
    print('Generated /app/organization.json')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
EOF
> import statistics
>
> def read_csv(filepath):
>     with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
>         reader = csv.DictReader(f)
>         return list(reader)
>
> def main():
>     departments = read_csv('/app/data/departments.csv')
>     employees = read_csv('/app/data/employees.csv')
>     projects = read_csv('/app/data/projects.csv')
>
>     # Build mapping
>     dept_by_id = {d['id']: d for d in departments}
>     # Convert budget to float
>     for d in departments:
>         d['budget'] = float(d['budget'])
>
>     # Group employees by department
>     emp_by_dept = {}
>     for e in employees:
>         dept_id = e['department_id']
>         emp_by_dept.setdefault(dept_id, []).append(e)
>
>     # Group projects by department
>     proj_by_dept = {}
>     for p in projects:
>         dept_id = p['department_id']
>         proj_by_dept.setdefault(dept_id, []).append(p)
>
>     # Build organization departments array
>     org_departments = []
>     for d in departments:
>         dept_id = d['id']
>         dept_employees = emp_by_dept.get(dept_id, [])
>         dept_projects = proj_by_dept.get(dept_id, [])
>
>         # Transform employees
>         employees_list = []
>         for e in dept_employees:
>             skills = e['skills'].split(';')
>             years = int(e['years_of_service'])
>             employees_list.append({
>                 'id': e['id'],
>                 'name': e['name'],
>                 'position': e['position'],
>                 'skills': skills,
>                 'years_of_service': years
>             })
>
>         # Transform projects
>         projects_list = []
>         for p in dept_projects:
>             members = p['member_ids'].split(';')
>             projects_list.append({
>                 'name': p['name'],
>                 'status': p['status'],
>                 'members': members,
>                 'deadline': p['deadline']
>             })
>
>         org_departments.append({
>             'id': d['id'],
>             'name': d['name'],
>             'budget': d['budget'],
>             'employees': employees_list,
>             'projects': projects_list
>         })
>
>     # Compute statistics
>     # averageDepartmentBudget
>     budgets = [d['budget'] for d in departments]
>     avg_budget = sum(budgets) / len(budgets)
>
>     # totalEmployees
>     total_employees = len(employees)
>
>     # skillDistribution across all employees
>     skill_dist = {}
>     for e in employees:
>         for skill in e['skills'].split(';'):
>             skill_dist[skill] = skill_dist.get(skill, 0) + 1
>
>     # departmentSizes (employee count per department id)
>     dept_sizes = {dept_id: len(emp_by_dept.get(dept_id, [])) for dept_id in dept_by_id}
>
>     # projectStatusDistribution across all projects
>     status_dist = {}
>     for p in projects:
>         status = p['status']
>         status_dist[status] = status_dist.get(status, 0) + 1
>
>     # averageYearsOfService
>     years_list = [int(e['years_of_service']) for e in employees]
>     avg_years = sum(years_list) / len(years_list)
>
>     stats = {
>         'averageDepartmentBudget': avg_budget,
>         'totalEmployees': total_employees,
>         'skillDistribution': skill_dist,
>         'departmentSizes': dept_sizes,
>         'projectStatusDistribution': status_dist,
>         'averageYearsOfService': avg_years
>     }
>
>     # Metadata
>     metadata = {
>         'version': '1.0',
>         'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + 'Z',
>         'generator': 'CSV Processor'
>     }
>
>     # Organization (name and founded not in CSV, set defaults)
>     organization = {
>         'name': 'Acme Corporation',
>         'founded': '2000-01-01',
>         'departments': org_departments
>     }
>
>     output = {
>         'metadata': metadata,
>         'organization': organization,
>         'statistics': stats
>     }
>
>     with open('/app/organization.json', 'w') as f:
>         json.dump(output, f, indent=2)
>     print('Generated /app/organization.json')
>
> if __name__ == '__main__':
>     main()
> EOF
